title: A $34 Billion Private Equity Exit Is Going to Be a Long Slog
title_cn: 340 亿美元的私募股权退出将是一个漫长的过程
summary: One of private equity’s biggest challenges right now is getting money back to investors. Advent and Cinven have just made a small dent in the industry’s mountain of unsold assets by agreeing the sale of TK Elevator to Finland’s Kone Oyj. What a relief. But the deal — worth €29.4 billion ($34.4 billion) including assumed net debt — exemplifies the challenges buyout firms face as they monetize even their most attractive investments.

title: Stocks, Bonds Hold Losses After Fed as Oil Jumps: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着油价上涨，美联储后股票和债券保持亏损：市场结束
summary: Wall Street traders left stocks and bonds lower after a widely expected Federal Reserve decision to hold rates, with a rally in oil fueling worries about an energy crunch that could boost inflation and weaken the economy.

title: Trump Fires Back at Merz Over Iran
title_cn: 特朗普就伊朗问题向梅尔茨回击
summary:
Donald Trump has fired back after Germany's chancellor suggested Iran had "humiliated" US negotiators.

Alex Morgan explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Pernod Ricard and Jack Daniel’s Maker End Merger Discussions
title_cn: 保乐力加 (Pernod Ricard) 和杰克丹尼 (Jack Daniel’s) Maker 终止合并讨论
summary: Bloomberg's Michelle Davis joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." Jack Daniel’s owner Brown-Forman and Jameson whiskey maker Pernod Ricard SA terminated their merger talks, marking an abrupt end to a potential transatlantic deal that was aimed at contending with the industry’s downturn. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Oil Exports Hit Record as Iran War Energy Crunch Deepens
title_cn: 随着伊朗战争能源紧缩加剧，美国石油出口创历史新高
summary: US crude exports surged to a record last week as the Iran war sends overseas buyers hunting for replacements to Middle Eastern oil.

title: 80 Seconds of Big Tech Earnings Will Decide Stock Market’s Fate
title_cn: 80秒的科技巨头盈利将决定股市的命运
summary: Investors looking for clues on which direction the stock market is headed in the coming weeks will get a rapid-fire reading as soon as trading ends on Wednesday.

title: Pershing Square's Ackman Talks IPO, State of Markets
title_cn: 潘兴广场的阿克曼谈论首次公开募股和市场状况
summary: Pershing Square founder and CEO Bill Ackman discusses the recent IPO of Pershing Square's new closed-end fund and alternative asset manager. Ackman emphasizes that this IPO marks the beginning of a long-term journey, with $5 billion in capital ready to be deployed within weeks. He speaks with Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trade Turmoil Hurts CN Railway; Stock Drops Most Since 2021
title_cn: 贸易动荡损害CN铁路；股价跌幅自 2021 年以来最大
summary: Shares of Canadian National Railway Co. slumped the most in more than four years after revenue came in below expectations, with the North American trade outlook still looking uncertain.

title: Atome Sees War Driving Shifts That Boost Low-Carbon Fertilizer
title_cn: Atome认为战争推动的转变将促进低碳化肥的发展
summary: The low-carbon fertilizer industry is getting a boost as buyers shift to long-term contracts amid rising geopolitical risks, according to the top executive at Atome PLC.

title: Ackman Says Stocks Above 'Stupidly Cheap' Market Bottom
title_cn: 阿克曼表示股票高于“极其便宜”的市场底部
summary: Pershing Square founder and CEO Bill Ackman says he doesn't see any strategic dislocations in markets during an interview with Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." Ackman’s combined IPO for his closed-end fund and alternative asset manager raised $5 billion. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ackman Says It'll Take Weeks, Not Months to Invest IPO Proceeds
title_cn: 阿克曼表示投资首次公开募股收益需要几周而不是几个月的时间
summary: Pershing Square founder and CEO Bill Ackman says the company's initial public offering is the "beginning of a journey" during an interview with Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." Ackman’s combined IPO for his closed-end fund and alternative asset manager raised $5 billion. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fed Keeps Rates Steady as Powell's Leadership Nears End
title_cn: 鲍威尔领导地位接近尾声美联储维持利率稳定
summary: Chairman of the US Federal Reserve Jerome Powell Photographer: Al Drago/Bloomberg

title: Can AI Be Trained to Predict the Past?
title_cn: 人工智能可以被训练来预测过去吗？
summary: A new LLM that’s living in our history.

title: Crop Prices Hit Highest Since 2023 as War and Bad Weather Bite
title_cn: 战争和恶劣天气影响农作物价格创 2023 年以来新高
summary: The extended closure of the Strait of Hormuz and extreme weather have jolted farm commodities prices to a two-year high, as fertilizer headaches and the prospect of smaller harvests drive food inflation risks.

title: EQT Said to Prepare Improved Takeover Bid for UK’s Intertek
title_cn: EQT 称准备改进对英国 Intertek 的收购要约
summary: EQT AB is preparing to make another improved offer for Intertek Group Plc, people familiar with the matter said, after seeing two bids rejected by the British product-testing company.

title: US Stocks Fall as Oil Jumps, Iran Tensions Rise Before Earnings
title_cn: 美股因油价上涨而下跌，伊朗紧张局势在财报公布前加剧
summary: US equities were mostly lower amid volatile trading on Wednesday as oil prices surged and a standoff between the US and Iran escalated after US President Donald Trump rejected an Iran proposal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Investors also braced for earnings reports from four megacap companies later in the day.

title: European Stocks Close Lower on Oil Surge, Mixed Earnings
title_cn: 欧洲股市收盘走低，因石油价格上涨，盈利好坏参半
summary: European stocks closed lower, as the prospect of a prolonged naval blockade of Iranian ports soured risk sentiment amid mixed earnings results.

title: Option Traders Build ‘Electric Fence’ Around Bitcoin at $80,000
title_cn: 期权交易者以 80,000 美元围绕比特币搭建“电子围栏”
summary: Bitcoin has been pressing toward $80,000 and struggling to get through. One reason: a hidden force in the options market is working against it.

title: Ukraine Says It Hit Russia Oil Station and Sanctioned Tanker
title_cn: 乌克兰称袭击俄罗斯油站并制裁油轮
summary: Ukraine said it hit an oil pumping station deep inside Russia, as well as a sanctioned tanker in the Black Sea, the latest in a wave of strikes on its adversary’s energy infrastructure.

title: Wingstop Diners Cut Back as Gas Prices Eat Household Budgets
title_cn: 由于汽油价格吃掉家庭预算，Wingstop 食客减少了开​​支
summary: Wingstop Inc. said the war in Iran is pushing up gas prices and straining household budgets to a point where consumers can no longer afford to buy chicken wings.

title: Big Tech Capex Hits Critical Limit
title_cn: 大型科技资本支出达到临界极限
summary: Big Tech is at a breaking point says John Blackledge, TD Cowen Senior Equity Research Analyst. He joined Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why massive AI spending may have peaked, why AWS and Google Cloud growth could make-or-break these stocks, and how fragile the market has become. With such sky-high expectations, even a small miss could trigger another selloff. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ‘All-In Wednesday’ to Test Stock Market Where Everyone’s Long
title_cn: “周三全押”测试每个人都做多的股市
summary: Investors who have been feasting on stocks will know by this evening whether the party will continue.

title: Tech Continues to Lead the Way: Dudley
title_cn: 科技继续引领潮流：达德利
summary: Katrina Dudley, Senior Investment Strategist for Franklin Templeton Public Markets, looks ahead to big tech earnings with Bloomberg's Dani Burger on 'Open Interest.' She says investors will be watching capex guidance and how sustainable it will be. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Wells Fargo CEO Says Private Credit Isn't a Systemic Risk
title_cn: 富国银行首席执行官表示私人信贷不是系统性风险
summary: Wells Fargo Chairman and CEO Charlie Scharf explains why he doesn't believe private credit is on the verge of collapse - but warns that investors may be underestimating the risks. He's on this week's episode of "The David Rubenstein Show: Peer to Peer Conversations." This interview was recorded April 20 at the Economic Club of Washington, DC. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran War Disrupts Travel More Than Prices: Booking CEO
title_cn: Booking首席执行官：伊朗战争对旅行的影响不仅仅是价格
summary: Booking CEO Glenn Fogel joined Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why global travel is taking a hit, and why he’s not worried long term. From war-driven disruptions shutting down key flight routes to shifting consumer sentiment, he explains what’s really behind the slowdown. He says travel demand is unstoppable, but geopolitics still controls the timing. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hormuz Crisis Drives Insurance Spike
title_cn: 霍尔木兹危机推动保险业飙升
summary: Shipping through the Strait of Hormuz hasn’t stopped, but the cost of doing it has surged according to Marsh CEO John Doyle. He joined Bloomberg Open Interest to explain how insurers are reacting to geopolitical risk, why premiums may stay high even after tensions ease, and why cyber threats now top his list of concerns in the AI era. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bloomberg Surveillance 4/29/2026
title_cn: 彭博社监测 2026 年 4 月 29 日
summary: Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern speak daily with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. No other program better positions investors and executives for the trading day. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gold Falls for Third Day as Iran War Fans Inflation Fears
title_cn: 伊朗战争加剧通胀担忧，金价连续第三天下跌
summary: Gold extended a decline, as investor focus remained on the prospect of talks between the US and Iran, with the indefinite closure of the Strait of Hormuz continuing to heighten inflation risks.

title: Banks Get Picky on Asset-Based Loans as Tricolor, MFS Hit Market
title_cn: Tricolor、MFS 进军市场，银行对资产贷款变得挑剔
summary: European banks are being more selective on asset-backed lending, as collapses including Tricolor Holdings and Market Financial Solutions Ltd. have made firms more cautious of the sector.

title: Oil Rises as US-Iran Standoff Threatens Prolonged Supply Shock
title_cn: 美伊僵局威胁长期供应冲击，油价上涨
summary: Oil rose on signals that a US blockade on Iranian ports could go on for an extended period, prolonging an unprecedented supply shock that has roiled energy markets.

title: Apple to Add AI-Powered Photo-Editing Tools
title_cn: 苹果将​​添加人工智能照片编辑工具
summary: Apple is planning a major overhaul of the built-in photo-editing features, powered by its Apple Intelligence platform, according to people familiar with the plans. Bloomberg's Mark Gurman joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.”  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: FCC to Review Disney-Owned TV Licenses Early
title_cn: FCC 将提前审查迪士尼拥有的电视许可证
summary: The Federal Communications Commission said it would do an early review of the licenses for eight Disney-owned TV stations. The move is tied to an investigation into the company’s diversity policy, but comes after a feud between President Donald Trump and ABC late-night host Jimmy Kimmel kicked back up. Bloomberg's Kelcee Griffis joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.”  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Plans a Siri Camera Mode and Upgraded Visual AI in iOS 27
title_cn: 苹果计划在 iOS 27 中加入 Siri 相机模式并升级视觉 AI
summary: Apple Inc. is planning to embed artificial intelligence more deeply into the iPhone’s camera app, adding a new Siri mode alongside the standard photo and video options in its upcoming iOS 27 operating system.

title: Motorola Raises Pricing of New Razr Phones in Pivotal Year for Foldables
title_cn: 摩托罗拉在可折叠手机的关键年提高了新款 Razr 手机的定价
summary: The company’s clamshell phones have gone up by as much as $200, while its first book-style foldable barely undercuts Samsung at $1,900.

title: Global Agents ID 100 Child Abuse Victims as AI Floods Case Files
title_cn: AI 泛滥导致全球特工发现 100 名儿童虐待受害者案件档案
summary: Operation Renewed Hope brought together victim identification specialists from 29 countries.

title: Blackstone Plans Overhaul With Focus on New AI Unit
title_cn: 黑石计划进行全面改革，重点关注新的人工智能部门
summary: Blackstone Inc. is folding its growth business into a new West Coast-based division that will focus solely on the alternative investment giant’s artificial intelligence portfolio, which includes OpenAI and Anthropic PBC.

title: IBM to Add 750 Jobs in AI, Quantum Computing at Chicago Tech Hub
title_cn: IBM 将在芝加哥科技中心新增 750 个人工智能和量子计算职位
summary: International Business Machines Corp. is deepening its bet on the Illinois Quantum and Microelectronics Park in Chicago, with plans to add 750 jobs over the next five years.

title: Chinese Hackers Spied On Cuban Embassy As US Prepared Blockade
title_cn: 美国准备封锁之际，中国黑客监视古巴大使馆
summary: Chinese hackers breached Cuba’s embassy in Washington to spy on communications of dozens of diplomats as the island nation stared down a US naval blockade, according to findings from the cyber firm Gambit Security.

title: Uber Adds Hotel Bookings to Its App Through New Expedia Partnership
title_cn: Uber 通过新的 Expedia 合作伙伴将酒店预订添加到其应用程序中
summary: Uber Technologies Inc. is adding hotel bookings in its flagship app, marking the ride-hail company’s biggest push yet into the travel market as it seeks to create an everything platform.

title: China Threatens EU With Retaliation if It Bans Huawei Gear
title_cn: 中国威胁欧盟如果禁止华为设备将进行报复
summary: China said it would retaliate against the European Union if it proceeds with a proposal to ban Huawei Technologies Co.’s equipment across the continent, escalating tensions in the long-running clash over national security and the communications company’s products.

title: Will Doomscrolling Come to an End?
title_cn: 末日卷轴会结束吗？
summary: A new European proposal is trying to put an end to doomscrolling. It’s a worthy goal, says Bloomberg Opinion columnist Parmy Olson. But will it happen? (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Cyberattack on NJ School Forces Debt Sale to Cover Stolen Funds
title_cn: 新泽西州学校遭受网络攻击迫使出售债务以弥补被盗资金
summary: A cyberattack that stole $4.8 million in taxpayer money has spurred a New Jersey suburb to issue short-term debt as officials try to recover the funds.

title: NXP Posts Record 25% Gain as Stronger Auto Market Boosts Outlook
title_cn: 汽车市场走强提振前景，恩智浦股价上涨 25%，创历史新高
summary: NXP Semiconductors NV shares jumped the most since its 2010 market debut after giving an upbeat revenue forecast, a sign the chipmaker is bouncing back from a prolonged auto industry slump and tariff uncertainties.

title: OpenAI Sued by Families of Canada School Shooting Victims
title_cn: 加拿大校园枪击案受害者家属起诉 OpenAI
summary: OpenAI is the target of new lawsuits over the mass shooting in Tumbler Ridge, British Columbia, that allege the artificial intelligence company could have stopped the suspected killer from using its popular chatbot, ChatGPT, ahead of the attack.

title: SoftBank-Tied Deal Extends Junk-Debt Spree for US Data Centers
title_cn: 软银联合交易扩大了美国数据中心的垃圾债务热潮
summary: A data center developer is offering $999 million of junk bonds for a project leased to a SoftBank Group Corp. subsidiary, testing investor appetite for artificial-intelligence exposure following a wave of similar deals.

title: Why Humanoid Robots Are the Ultimate AI Frontier
title_cn: 为什么人形机器人是人工智能的终极前沿
summary: On this episode of Bloomberg Primer, we explore the gap between futuristic hype and reality—and how quickly it will shrink.

title: Anthropic, OpenAI Splurge on London Offices in Leasing Wave
title_cn: Anthropic、OpenAI 在租赁浪潮中斥巨资收购伦敦办事处
summary: Artificial intelligence-linked companies, including Anthropic PBC and OpenAI, have been rushing into London for office space in a surge that’s surprised local landlords.

title: Cambricon’s Revenue Jumps on Strong AI Chip Demand in China
title_cn: 中国人工智能芯片需求强劲，寒武纪营收大幅增长
summary: Chinese AI chipmaker Cambricon Technologies Corp.’s first-quarter sales more than doubled, as Beijing’s push for self-sufficiency in critical technologies including semiconductors has fueled local demand for its products.

title: Defense Upstarts Capitalize on Global Conflict as Budgets Shift
title_cn: 随着预算的变化，国防新贵利用全球冲突
summary: A new crop of defense startups from drone makers to software developers are emerging on Wall Street as governments raise military budgets and refill depleting supplies amid intensifying geopolitical tensions.

title: Mag 7 Companies Likely to Sustain AI Capex Budgets, Analyst Zino Says
title_cn: 分析师 Zino 表示，Mag 7 公司可能会维持人工智能资本支出预算
summary: Angelo Zino, senior equity analyst at CFRA Research, is watching guidance on AI capex spending as the magnificent seven tech companies begin to report earnings. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: GE HealthCare Drops After Cutting Outlook on War-Related Woes
title_cn: GE医疗保健公司因战争相关问题而下调前景后股价下跌
summary: GE HealthCare Technologies Inc. shares sank after the company reported a profit miss and cut its outlook, citing supply issues and higher costs.

title: AI, Capex in Focus as Big Tech Earnings Begin
title_cn: 随着大型科技公司开始盈利，人工智能和资本支出成为焦点
summary: Earnings reports from Alphabet, Amazon.com, Meta and Microsoft, the four biggest spenders on artificial intelligence computing infrastructure, are due after the bell. Mandeep Singh of Bloomberg Intelligence has a preview. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Manus Mess Won’t Dim Singapore’s Appeal for Startups
title_cn: 马努斯的混乱不会削弱新加坡对初创企业的吸引力
summary: Chinese founders will keep coming to Singapore, even after Manus flashpoint

title: Arlington Capital Acquires Nuclear Engineering Firm Enercon
title_cn: 阿灵顿资本收购核工程公司 Enercon
summary: Arlington Capital Partners has acquired nuclear engineering company Enercon from Oaktree Capital Management.

title: Junior Bankers Sick of Grunt Work Build $2 Billion AI Tool to Do the Job
title_cn: 厌倦了繁重工作的初级银行家开发了 20 亿美元的人工智能工具来完成这项工作
summary: Rogo, started by young bankers around a kitchen table in 2021, just won a multibillion-dollar valuation

title: Stocks Fall as Report on OpenAI Fuels Angst | The Close 4/28/2026
title_cn: OpenAI 报告引发焦虑，股市下跌收盘价 2026 年 4 月 28 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Raymond James’ Sunaina Sinha Haldea, Sysco CEO Kevin Hourican, Former Kansas City Fed President Thomas Hoenig, Fidelity’s Jurrien Timmer, Allspring Global Investments’ Abby Roach, Mizuho’s Dan Dolev, Gabelli Funds’ John Belton, & First Independence Bank CEO Kenneth Kelly. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Founder Jailed for Nine Years in $300 Million eFishery Case
title_cn: 创始人因价值 3 亿美元的 eFishery 案被判入狱九年
summary: Indonesia handed eFishery founder Gibran Huzaifah a nine-year prison sentence on Wednesday, concluding a high-profile $300 million financial scandal that destroyed one of Southeast Asia’s most celebrated startups.

title: China’s Meta Backlash Renders Manus Model ‘Officially Dead’
title_cn: 中国的元强烈反对使马努斯模式“正式死亡”
summary: The AI startup Manus, once hailed as a breakthrough that would challenge Silicon Valley’s dominance, is turning into a cautionary tale for Chinese entrepreneurs after Beijing authorities ordered Meta Platforms Inc. to unwind its $2 billion takeover of the company.

title: Billionaire Adani’s Copper Plant Is Said to Be Beset By Problems
title_cn: 亿万富翁阿达尼的铜厂据说受到问题困扰
summary: Billionaire Gautam Adani’s $1.2 billion copper plant has hit a string of technical setbacks since it was commissioned 10 months ago, raising concerns about the future of an operation vital to adding supply outside China.

title: A Tiny Pin Stokes High-Stakes Rift Between Venezuela, Guyana
title_cn: 一颗小别针引发了委内瑞拉和圭亚那之间的高风险裂痕
summary: A tiny brooch worn by Venezuela’s new US-supported leader Delcy Rodríguez has become a diplomatic lightning rod.

title: Pentagon Says US Has Spent $25 Billion on Iran War So Far
title_cn: 五角大楼称美国迄今为止已在伊朗战争上花费了250亿美元
summary: Pentagon officials said the Iran war had cost $25 billion so far, offering the estimate in a contentious congressional hearing that saw Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth trade barbs with Democrats over the administration’s handling of the conflict.

title: Fed Chair Pick Kevin Warsh Wins Key Senate Committee Vote
title_cn: 美联储主席凯文·沃什赢得参议院委员会关键投票
summary: Kevin Warsh, President Donald Trump’s nominee to be the next chair of the Federal Reserve, won the backing of the Senate Banking Committee Wednesday on a 13-11 party-line vote, putting him on track to be confirmed by the full Senate before Jerome Powell’s term ends May 15.

title: DOT’s Duffy Pitches Fee to Help Pay for Air Traffic Upgrades
title_cn: DOT 的 Duffy Pitch 费用用于帮助支付空中交通升级费用
summary: US Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy floated the idea of charging a fee to help the US Federal Aviation Administration modernize its air traffic control system on a more regular basis.

title: UAE Quits OPEC, OpenAI Hits Back at Growth Fears | Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 4/28/2026
title_cn: 阿联酋退出 OPEC，OpenAI 回击增长担忧 |彭博商业周刊日报 2026 年 4 月 28 日
summary:
On today's episode of Bloomberg Businessweek Daily, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec discuss the latest in global markets. They discuss OpenAI's response to growth fears with Rudina Seseri, Glasswing Ventures Founder & Managing Partner, and King Charles III's visit to the US with Ed Price, Senior Fellow (non-resident) at New York University, and former British Trade Official. They also discuss how C-Suite is weighing growth with Mitch Berlin, EY Americas Vice Chair, EY-Parthenon.

Correction: The name chyron for Mitch Berlin should read EY-Parthenon (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Modi Poised for Surprise Win in Key State, Exit Polls Show
title_cn: 出口民意调查显示，莫迪有望在关键州意外获胜
summary: Prime Minister Narendra Modi had a slight edge over his main rival in the key Indian state of West Bengal, exit polls from the closely contested election showed, giving the ruling party the chance to govern the region for the first time ever.

title: Texas Democrat Talarico Has Edge on Republicans in Senate Race
title_cn: 德克萨斯州民主党人塔拉里科在参议院竞选中领先于共和党人
summary: Texas Democrat James Talarico holds leads over both Republicans vying for the competitive US Senate seat, reflecting voters’ surging concerns about the cost of living and dimming views of President Donald Trump’s handling of the economy, according to a new poll by the University of Texas.

title: Trump Ally Nearer to Comeback in Slovenia After Vote on Cabinet
title_cn: 内阁投票后，特朗普盟友在斯洛文尼亚即将卷土重来
summary: Slovenia’s nationalist leader and ally of US President Donald Trump inched closer to his political comeback after a vote showed he now commands a majority in parliament.

title: Warsh Denies Any Connections to Epstein in Response to Warren
title_cn: 沃什回应沃伦，否认与爱泼斯坦有任何联系
summary: Kevin Warsh, President Donald Trump’s nominee to be the next chair of the Federal Reserve, denied connections to disgraced financier Jeffrey Epstein after his name was referenced in files on Epstein published by the Department of Justice.

title: Trump Says He Rejects Iran Hormuz Offer, Keeps Blockade
title_cn: 特朗普表示他拒绝伊朗霍尔木兹的提议并继续封锁
summary: President Donald Trump told Axios he will not lift a naval blockade of Iran’s ports until he secures a deal with Tehran to address the country’s nuclear program, extending a standoff over the Strait of Hormuz that has caused a global energy crisis.

title: Hungary’s Magyar Sees Political Deal Over EU Funds By End-May
title_cn: 匈牙利马扎尔预计五月底前就欧盟基金达成政治协议
summary: Hungary’s incoming Prime Minister Peter Magyar said he will sign a political deal paving the way for the release of around €10 billion ($11.7 billion) in European Union recovery funds at the end of May.

title: Cuba Says It Poses No Threat as Rubio Warns of Foreign Influence
title_cn: 卢比奥警告外国影响，古巴表示不构成威胁
summary: Cuba’s top diplomat accused Washington of trying to manufacture a pretext for toppling the government in Havana after US senators failed to limit Donald Trump’s ability to use military force against the island.

title: UN Must Do Less With Less, Says Candidate to Become Next Leader
title_cn: 下一任领导人候选人表示，联合国必须少花钱多办事
summary: The United Nations must deal with its shrinking budget and narrow the scope of its mission, a leading contender for the UN secretary general job said as the US has yet to back a candidate.

title: Russian Speaking ‘El Money’ Recruited Arsonists to Target Starmer, Prosecutors Say
title_cn: 检察官称，俄语“El Money”招募纵火犯瞄准斯塔默
summary: A person who communicated in Russian and used the pseudonym “El Money” promised to pay arsonists to target property linked to UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer last year, prosecutors said at the start of a London trial.

title: Trump Discussed Extended Blockade With Oil, Commodities Chiefs
title_cn: 特朗普与石油和大宗商品负责人讨论了延长封锁
summary: President Donald Trump discussed steps the US could take to prolong its blockade of Iran during a meeting with oil and trading industry executives Tuesday, as the Middle East war continues to drive up prices for crude and other commodities.

title: Florida House Backs DeSantis Bid to Redraw Congressional Lines
title_cn: 佛罗里达州众议院支持德桑蒂斯重新划定国会界限的提议
summary: Florida’s House on Wednesday backed Governor Ron DeSantis’ bid to redraw the state’s congressional districts in an effort to secure as many as four additional US House seats for Republicans in November’s midterm elections.

title: Warsh Wins Key Senate Committee Vote to Be Next Fed Chair
title_cn: 沃什赢得参议院委员会关键投票，成为下一任美联储主席
summary: Kevin Warsh won the backing of the Senate Banking Committee on a 13-11 party-line vote to be the next chair of the Federal Reserve. Mike McKee reports on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: DC Gala Shooting Suspect Tracked Trump’s Movements, DOJ Says
title_cn: 司法部称，华盛顿特区晚会枪击案嫌疑人追踪特朗普的行踪
summary: The man charged with attempting to assassinate Donald Trump at a Washington hotel on Saturday followed the president’s movements in real-time using a website and live video feeds just before a shootout with security at the venue, according to new details disclosed by the US Justice Department.

title: Supreme Court Limits Use of Race in Drawing Voting Districts
title_cn: 最高法院限制在抽签选区时使用种族因素
summary: The US Supreme Court voted 6-3 along ideological lines to limit the use of the Voting Rights Act to create predominantly Black or Hispanic election districts. The justices rejected a Louisiana congressional map that was drawn with a second majority-Black district after a lower court found an earlier map to be discriminatory. Michael McKee reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Has Spent $25 Billion on Iran Conflict So Far, Pentagon Says
title_cn: 五角大楼称，迄今为止，美国已在伊朗冲突上花费了 250 亿美元
summary: The US has spent an estimated $25 billion on the Iran war so far, the Pentagon comptroller said, providing the most complete public estimate of the conflict’s cost.

title: Cincinnati Mayor on Infrastructure, Housing, Rebuilding Waterfront
title_cn: 辛辛那提市长谈基础设施、住房和重建滨水区
summary: Aftab Pureval, mayor of Cincinnati, Ohio, talks about his priorities, adding new housing and rebuilding the waterfront on the Ohio River. He speaks to Bloomberg's Chad Thomas from the Bloomberg CityLab event in Madrid. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: France Urges Citizens to Leave Mali as Rebels Vow to Oust Junta
title_cn: 法国敦促公民离开马里，叛军誓言推翻军政府
summary: France urged its citizens to leave Mali “as soon as possible” as a separatist group vowed to expand its campaign to oust the nation’s military junta and Islamist militants renewed a threat to blockade the capital.

title: Israel Readies Sale of Stakes in State Defense Firms by Year-End
title_cn: 以色列准备在年底前出售国防公司的股份
summary: Israel is preparing to sell a stake of as much as 30% in its two largest defense companies this year to help fund the nation’s expanding military spending.

title: US Naval Blockade Pushes Iran’s Currency to Record Low
title_cn: 美国海军封锁使伊朗货币跌至历史新低
summary: Iran’s currency has fallen in recent days to a fresh record low, in a sign the US’s naval blockade is squeezing the Islamic Republic’s economy.

title: Supreme Court Curbs Use of Race in Drawing Voting Districts
title_cn: 最高法院限制在抽签选区时使用种族因素
summary:
The US Supreme Court limited the use of the Voting Rights Act to create predominantly Black or Hispanic election districts in a major constitutional ruling that buttresses Republican efforts to keep control of the House in this year’s midterms and beyond.
Voting 6-3 along ideological lines, the justices rejected a Louisiana congressional map that was drawn with a second majority-Black district after a lower court found an earlier map to be discriminatory.
Bloomberg Law Host June Grasso discusses the ruling with Paul Sweeney and Scarlet Fu on Bloomberg Intelligence. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Mercedes to Challenge UK’s £7.5 Billion Motor Finance Plan
title_cn: 梅赛德斯挑战英国 75 亿英镑汽车融资计划
summary: Mercedes-Benz Group AG’s financial services unit filed an appeal challenging the UK’s £7.5 billion plan to compensate customers who were overcharged for auto loans.

title: NYC Taxpayers Face $500 Million Bill Under Pension Proposals
title_cn: 纽约市纳税人面临 5 亿美元的养老金提案
summary: New York City taxpayers may face a bill of more than $500 million next year if proposals to increase public employee benefits are approved as part of the state budget.

title: Australia Tells China Stable Trade Needs Stable Fuel Supply
title_cn: 澳大利亚告诉中国稳定的贸易需要稳定的燃料供应
summary: Australian Foreign Minister Penny Wong delivered a strong message to China on Wednesday: stable shipments of commodities and food requires continued imports of petrol, jet fuel and fertilizer.

title: Burnham Sees 'Challenging' UK Local Elections for Labour
title_cn: 伯纳姆认为英国地方工党选举“具有挑战性”
summary: Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham discusses the UK local elections, the threat to Labour posed by the Green Party and Nigel Farage's Reform, and why he thinks Prime Minister Keir Starmer deserves more credit. He talks with Francine Lacqua at Bloomberg's CityLab event in Madrid. (Source: Bloomberg)
